title: ATTICUS_MPO governing packet chain state
content: The post-recovery implementation program is governed by master packet ORCH-20260411-010. ROADMAP.md records Packet 011 and 012 as complete, Packet 013 as in progress, and Packets 014, 015, and 016 as queued. WORK_LOG.md records PR #92 as the planning-only introduction of this packet chain.
context_summary: Durable packet-governance cell for MPO. Captures the current implementation-program chain and its normalized status so future sessions can recover the governing work structure quickly.
